After the opEx + Intraday post (21/July)

Weekly post is out

Monthly update, Inflation + Weekly post (21-25/July)

In the monthly post I predicted buyback flow after the OpEx, SPX is currently trading at 6313 during the overnight session. Structurally the market is now dancing on a rope: 6321.75 for ES=F and 6281.89 for SPX. There will be no snowball effect if they produce a daily close below these lines, but they reinforce the slow momentum shift as market is starting to gravitate towards where the liquidity lies.

As being said, market is expected to range in the weekly zone I market in the next 2 weeks, and customerst hedge for heavy but capped right tail (spot up/vol up spike) as FOMC comes closer (my risk target).Let’s go here day by day and week by week.

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

We have a short fly pattern, with heavy net negative speed profile for today, with centroid of 6310.63, that is a very strong pivot after 12.40AM

Above the centroid, the upside pivot is 6321.19, with max upside target of 6338/40Below 6322, during the afternoon, the spot is pretty much expected to be pinned to 6320 (with 6325 resistance during the powerhour).

Below the centroid, the key pivot is 6298.43; high vol is needed to break it. We have a mild support at 6280/85 (especially strong during the last 1.5 hours), but the max downside today is 6231.

To the downside there is a vol pivot at 6268/65 zone (strong support/resistance after 2.30PM), where downside vol is expected to catch up (short fly pattern ,don’t forget), and also back above it, the 6298.43 lvl is strongly magnetic.

If price goes down, it will have a harder time to climb back after 12.20AM.6255 is a significant resistance (especially during the last 1.5 hours), and can push the price back to 6235, if 6247 cannot hold during the power hour (otherwise 6255 is also can pull the spot towards itself, during the last hour).

Market is betting on a 6300 pin, with occasional upside spikes with spot up/vol up manner.
